gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer initially found public-module monkeypatch capture for constants/classes; the branch was patched and the same reviewer approved with no remaining merge blockers.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_storage_benchmark.py -q
what_changed: Replaced the legacy restaurant_kv_serving.storage_benchmark implementation with a compatibility facade over document_kv_cache.storage_benchmark.
Preserved legacy monkeypatch hooks through an isolated document namespace while avoiding import-order capture of public module monkeypatches.
Added regression coverage for public-module monkeypatches applied before importing the legacy facade.
why: Keeps the legacy restaurant namespace working while removing duplicated storage benchmark implementation from the compatibility package.
